name: Masterworks 1: Stefan Jackiw, violin
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 🎭 Artistic Merit – Stefan Jackiw delivered the Prokofiev Violin Concerto No. 2 with precise intonation in the G minor Allegro moderato's rapid passages; his bow control sharpened the lyrical second theme without smudging its melancholy. The orc…
